strengths: Extensive TypeScript and full-stack experience across React, Node.js, and Nest.js-like architectures, directly matching core requirements.
Proven track record in building scalable, data-integrated platforms (e.g., GISCollective, Optilyz pricing engine) with real-world parallels to energy consulting workflows.
Demonstrated ownership of end-to-end systems — from frontend UIs to backend APIs, DevOps tooling, and Kubernetes deployments — aligning with the role’s emphasis on progressive responsibility.
concerns: Current role at re:cinq (April 2025–present) is listed as future-dated, raising questions about timeline accuracy or role description clarity.
German language proficiency is listed as 'Basic,' while high on-site presence in Berlin is required, potentially impacting daily collaboration.
Experience with PostgreSQL is implied but not explicitly stated, while MongoDB and MySQL are prominently featured.

key_factors.factor: End-to-end system ownership and DevOps fluency

response.justification: Bogdan brings deep, hands-on full-stack expertise in TypeScript, React, and scalable web architectures, with direct alignment to the platform’s needs — including API integration, data-driven workflows, and infrastructure ownership. His open-source GIS platform mirrors the domain’s spatial-data challenges, and his consistent delivery of complex systems from UI to deployment demonstrates the initiative and systems thinking the role demands.
